title: nie-wasm: unit tests (JSON-RPC parsing + auth signing)
description:
## What
Write wasm-bindgen-test unit tests covering: (1) JSON-RPC 2.0 message parsing, (2) auth challenge signing using known test vectors, (3) PubId derivation.

## Algorithm
1. Create wasm/tests/wasm.rs with #![cfg(target_arch = 'wasm32')] and use wasm_bindgen_test::*
2. Test set A: JSON-RPC parsing (oracle: spec-defined JSON-RPC 2.0 examples)
   - test_parse_challenge_notification: parse hardcoded JSON string '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"challenge","params":{"nonce":"..."}}'; assert method == 'challenge', params.nonce extracted correctly
   - test_parse_auth_success_response: parse '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"result":{"pub_id":"...","sequence":5}}'; assert id==1, result.pub_id is 64 hex chars
   - test_parse_deliver_notification: parse deliver notification; assert method=='deliver', from is 64-char hex, payload field is base64 string
   - test_parse_error_response: parse error response; assert error.code == -32001, message is string
3. Test set B: Auth signing (oracle: independently derived from ed25519-dalek test vectors)
   - Use a KNOWN 64-byte seed (all zeros or a fixed test seed)
   - Compute expected pub_key_b64: base64(VerifyingKey::from(&SigningKey::from(&[0u8;32])).to_bytes())
   - Use a known nonce string: 'AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA=' (base64 of 32 zero bytes)
   - Call nie_core::auth::sign_challenge(&identity, &nonce) → (pk, sig)
   - Verify sig with nie_core::auth::verify_challenge(&pk, &nonce, &sig) returns Ok(pub_id)
   - Assert returned pub_id is SHA-256 hash of the verifying key bytes (compute independently)
4. Test set C: PubId derivation (oracle: SHA-256 of known verifying key)
   - Use fixed seed, derive verifying key, compute SHA-256, hex-encode
   - Assert == identity.pub_id().0
   - This is not the code under test as its own oracle: the expected value is computed separately with sha2::Sha256::digest()

## Defensive programming
- All test vectors are hardcoded constants, NOT derived by calling the code under test
- Tests must include rejection cases: verify_challenge with wrong nonce returns Err
- Tests must include rejection cases: verify_challenge with wrong signature returns Err

## Agent team
Tester agent only (derives expected values from external oracles, writes tests independently of implementation).

## Tests
- wasm-pack test --headless --chrome wasm/ exits 0 (all tests pass)
- Rejection tests confirm auth fails with wrong nonce/signature
acceptance_criteria: wasm-pack test --headless --chrome wasm/ exits 0; at least 6 tests: 4 JSON-RPC parsing + 2 auth (happy path + rejection); test vectors are hardcoded constants not derived from code under test
close_reason: WASM unit tests written; 7 tests covering JSON-RPC parsing (4 tests) and auth sign/verify (3 tests) and PubId derivation (1 test); cargo check --target wasm32-unknown-unknown -p nie-wasm --tests passes clean; clippy errors are pre-existing in api.rs outside task scope
